description: Authorization capability matrix per profile. Enforced at runtime by hooks/scripts/auth_profile_enforcer.py via pretool_guard. Refs #2910 (G-05, ASI02).

capabilitySchema.install: Allow package manager install commands (npm install, pip install, apt install, etc.)
capabilitySchema.privileged: Allow privilege escalation commands (sudo, su, chown, etc.)
capabilitySchema.execute_remote: Allow remote execution (ssh, scp, rsync remote, ansible, etc.)
